name: Skillet Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, thoroughly combine the ground beef, onion, milk, egg, oats, salt, and pepper.
2. Shape the mixture into a loaf in a 10-inch skillet.
3. Brush the top of the meatloaf lightly with Kitchen Bouquet.
4. In a small bowl, mix together spaghetti sauce and kidney beans with their liquid.
5. Pour the sauce over the meatloaf.
6. Simmer uncovered on top of the stove for 20-25 minutes, or until the meatloaf is thoroughly cooked.
7. Makes 6 servings.
MasterCook formatted by Ethel Snyder
